title: Sunrise Yoga Mixology
description: Start your day with mindful movements and the art of craft cocktail making. A unique mind-body-pour experience.

title: Advanced Cocktail Techniques
description: Master clarification, fat-washing, and advanced batching for home and professional bars.

title: Whiskey Tasting Masterclass
description: Deep dive into American whiskey — distillation, aging, mash bills, and sensory evaluation.

title: Classic Martini Workshop
description: Demystify the martini. Learn the gin-to-vermouth ratio, stirring technique, and garnish mastery.
